edges.description: Which insets to apply. Supports 'top' | 'right' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'all' | 'horizontal' | 'vertical', or an array of those.

mode.description: Apply the insets as padding (default) or margin.

fillBackground.description: Apply the theme background to the wrapper so notch areas look consistent.

children.description: Content rendered inside the safe area wrapper.

className.description: Additional CSS class for the wrapper.
